title: Sweet Egyptian Cabbage Stew
description: A gentle, sweet stew inspired by Egyptian flavors, featuring tender savoy cabbage and a caramelized onion base.

ingredients.name: Savoy cabbage
ingredients.notes: Rinse and cut into bite‑sized pieces

instructions: Rinse the savoy cabbage, remove outer leaves, cut into 1‑inch wedges, then chop into bite‑sized pieces.
Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add sliced onions and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook 30 seconds until fragrant.
Stir in carrot slices and cook 3 minutes.
Add tomato paste, apple cider vinegar, and honey; stir to coat vegetables and bring to a gentle simmer.
Pour in water or broth, bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and add the cabbage pieces.
Cover and let simmer for 25–30 minutes, stirring occasionally, until cabbage is tender but still slightly flaky.
Season with salt and pepper to taste; simmer another 5 minutes.
Remove from heat, garnish with chopped parsley, and serve hot.
Optional: serve over a small portion of steamed rice or couscous.
